original_query:
WITH combined AS (
  SELECT 
    "t2"."JOB", 
    "t2"."MIN_SAL", 
    "t2"."MIN_DEPTNO", 
    "t2"."MAX_SAL", 
    "t2"."COUNT_SAL", 
    "t2"."COUNT_MGR",
    "t3"."f1",
    CAST("t2"."SUM_SAL_2" * "t3"."f1" AS INTEGER) AS sum_sal_casted
  FROM (
    SELECT 
      "JOB", 
      MIN("SAL") AS "MIN_SAL", 
      MIN("DEPTNO") AS "MIN_DEPTNO", 
      SUM("SAL") AS "SUM_SAL_2", 
      MAX("SAL") AS "MAX_SAL", 
      COUNT(*) AS "COUNT_SAL", 
      COUNT("MGR") AS "COUNT_MGR" 
    FROM "EMP" 
    GROUP BY "JOB"
  ) AS "t2" 
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT 
      "NAME", 
      COUNT(*) AS "f1" 
    FROM "DEPT" 
    GROUP BY "NAME"
  ) AS "t3" ON "t2"."JOB" = "t3"."NAME"
)
SELECT 
  "JOB", 
  "MIN_SAL", 
  "MIN_DEPTNO", 
  sum_sal_casted + 1 AS "SUM_SAL_PLUS", 
  "MAX_SAL", 
  sum_sal_casted AS "SUM_SAL_2", 
  "COUNT_SAL" * "f1" AS "COUNT_SAL", 
  "COUNT_MGR" * "f1" AS "COUNT_MGR" 
FROM combined

    "t2"."MAX_SAL", 
    "t2"."COUNT_SAL", 
    "t2"."COUNT_MGR",
    "t3"."f1",
    CAST("t2"."SUM_SAL_2" * "t3"."f1" AS INTEGER) AS sum_sal_casted
  FROM (
    SELECT 
      "JOB", 
      MIN("SAL") AS "MIN_SAL", 
      MIN("DEPTNO") AS "MIN_DEPTNO", 
      SUM("SAL") AS "SUM_SAL_2", 
      MAX("SAL") AS "MAX_SAL", 
      COUNT(*) AS "COUNT_SAL", 
      COUNT("MGR") AS "COUNT_MGR" 
    FROM "EMP" 
    GROUP BY "JOB"
  ) AS "t2" 
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT 
      "NAME", 
      COUNT(*) AS "f1" 
    FROM "DEPT" 
    GROUP BY "NAME"
  ) AS "t3" ON "t2"."JOB" = "t3"."NAME"
)
SELECT 
  "JOB", 
  "MIN_SAL", 
  "MIN_DEPTNO", 
  sum_sal_casted + 1 AS "SUM_SAL_PLUS", 
  "MAX_SAL", 
  sum_sal_casted AS "SUM_SAL_2", 
  "COUNT_SAL" * "f1" AS "COUNT_SAL", 
  "COUNT_MGR" * "f1" AS "COUNT_MGR" 
FROM combined

original_query: SELECT "t6"."JOB" FROM (SELECT "JOB", "DEPTNO" + "EMPNO" AS "f9" FROM "EMP" WHERE "ENAME" = 'A' GROUP BY "JOB", "DEPTNO" + "EMPNO") AS "t6" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "NAME", "DEPTNO" + 5 AS "f2" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY "NAME", "DEPTNO" + 5) AS "t8" ON "t6"."JOB" = "t8"."NAME" AND "t6"."f9" = "t8"."f2" GROUP BY "t6"."JOB"

WHERE "DEPTNO" = 20
  AND "SAL" > 1000

original_query:
WITH filtered_dept AS (
  SELECT "DEPTNO" 
  FROM "EMP" 
  WHERE "DEPTNO" < 4
)
SELECT t7."DEPTNO", t12."DEPTNO"
FROM filtered_dept AS t7
INNER JOIN filtered_dept AS t12
ON t7."DEPTNO" = t12."DEPTNO"

  SELECT "DEPTNO" 
  FROM "EMP"

)

FROM filtered_dept AS t7
INNER JOIN filtered_dept AS t12
ON t7."DEPTNO" = t12."DEPTNO"

original_query:
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN "EMP"."DEPTNO" = 0 THEN 1 END) AS "EXPR0", t."T2"
FROM "EMP"
CROSS JOIN (VALUES (1), (2)) AS t("T2")
GROUP BY t."T2"

original_query:
SELECT "DEPT"."NAME"
FROM "DEPT"
JOIN (
    SELECT "DEPTNO"
    FROM "EMP"
    WHERE "SAL" = "DEPTNO" - 11
) AS "t6" ON "DEPT"."DEPTNO" = "t6"."DEPTNO";

original_query:
SELECT "t0"."JOB", "t1"."NAME"
FROM (
    SELECT "JOB", "DEPTNO" + "EMPNO" AS "f9"
    FROM "EMP"
    WHERE "ENAME" = 'A'
) "t0"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT "NAME", "DEPTNO" + 5 AS "f2"
    FROM "DEPT"
) "t1"
ON "t0"."JOB" = "t1"."NAME" AND "t0"."f9" = "t1"."f2"

) "t0"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT "NAME", "DEPTNO" + 5 AS "f2"
    FROM "DEPT"
) "t1"
ON "t0"."JOB" = "t1"."NAME" AND "t0"."f9" = "t1"."f2"

original_query:

FROM "EMPNULLABLES"
CROSS JOIN (SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 1) AS dummy
WHERE "DEPTNO" = 1
